title: YAHTZEE Grinch Dice Game, Collectible Dice Cup with Green Dice, Christmas Themed Family Board Game, Classic Game with a Festive Dr. Seuss Twist, Officially Licensed Game & Merchandise
description: to be determined
features: You're a mean one… but can you roll a Yahtzee? Shake up holiday mischief with a custom Grinch dice cup and bright green dice featuring classic icons from the beloved Dr. Seuss tale.
Garlic in your soul? Roll for the win! Match symbols like a heart, sock, and banana to score big—just don’t be a Grinch when someone else gets a Yahtzee first!
Cuddly as a cactus? Bring the whole family! Whether you’re as sweet as Cindy Lou or as tricky as the Grinch, this game is perfect for holiday gatherings and family fun.
I wouldn’t touch you with a 39-and-a-half-foot pole— but I’d play this! A festive twist on the classic dice game, adding laughter, strategy, and a bit of Grinchy mischief.
Who is this mean fellow? It's you—if you win! Roll, strategize, and claim victory before the Grinch steals Christmas. A perfect holiday gift for Dr. Seuss fans and game lovers alike!

title: Spin Master Games, Cardinal Classics Chess Teacher, Learn to Play Strategy Board Games for Beginners, Chess Sets for Adults, 2 Players, for Ages 8 & Up
description: Cardinal Classics Chess Teacher is a chess set for learners, with labeled movers made specifically for beginners. All you need is 2 players- a perfect couples game- or grab a friend or family member. This chess set for adults or kids ages 8 & up is easy to set up. Clearly marked pieces make learning chess easy. Large chess pieces show the direction and number of spaces each piece can move. Our Chess Teacher chess set can help teach beginners or novices the different chess moves. Its unique notation system will enhance enjoyment, too. Examine the chess pieces for a moment and study the unique notation. Each piece shows its name and tell how many spaces and in what direction it moves. No need for a chess clock or other fancy accessories, this kids’ board game is all about learning. If you are searching for a fun gift for a smart person in your life, look no further than this chess set board game for kids ages 8-12. It is also a great adult board game- anyone who is curious to learn the time-tested classic game of chess will adore this set. From Cardinal Classics, Chess Teacher is the best way to go from beginner to grandmaster.

title: Spin Master Sandy Sketches Sand Drawing Guessing Board Game, Family Game for Ages 8 and up
description: You can finally play in the sand without getting it in your clothes! SandySketches is the speedy drawing game where you have 60 seconds to sketch pictures in the sand for your partner(s) to guess. Advance your surfboard mover around the gameboard with every correct answer, but miss one and it’s a step back for your team. Make it completely around the gameboard first or be the last team standing and you’re in for the win.

title: Ravensburger Disney Villainous - Introduction to Evil Strategy Board Game - Compatible with Other Villainous Games - Includes Lorcana Promo Card - Ages 10+
description:
Unleash your inner villain in Disney Villainous: Introduction to Evil. Choose to play as the cunning Maleficent, Prince John, Ursula, or Captain Hook, each with distinct abilities and goals to achieve. Navigate the twists of fate as you encounter iconic heroes like Robin Hood, The Little Mermaid, and Peter Pan, who will challenge your villainous plans. Utilize the included villain guides to master each character's unique strategies for endless replayability. Introduction to Evil can be enjoyed as a standalone game or combined with other Disney Villainous sets for even more villainous fun! Suitable for kids ages 10 and up, with a playing time of 40 to 60 minutes.

Recognized as the 2019 Toy of the Year, and a 2020 finalist, Villainous players must navigate their own villain's realm, employing cunning tactics to outsmart rivals and secure victory. Villainous gameplay is rich with opportunities for deception and strategy, ensuring that every decision you make is crucial. While engaging critical thinking skills, problem solving, and the art of deduction, you will outwit your friends and claim the title of the ultimate Disney Villain.

With beautifully designed components and immersive gameplay, this stand-alone/expansion board game is a must-have for boys and girls ages 10-12, 11-13, 14-15 and older who cherish Disney card and board games. Gather your friends, embrace your inner villain, and prepare for a wickedly fun adventure that promises hours of entertainment!
features: Embrace Your Inner Villain: Evil characters you love along with heroes like Robin Hood, Peter Pan, and the Little Mermaid. Play as is, or combine with other Villainous games - The Worst Takes It All, Wicked to the Core, or Perfectly Wretched.

Engaging Strategic Gameplay: Master the art of deception and connect with your inner villain as you navigate your realm with cunning tactics to outsmart your opponents utilizing critical thinking, problem solving and memorization skills.

Visually Stunning Experience: Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Introduction to Evil with exquisite artwork and thematic components that enhance every game session. With more Villains to choose from, exciting gameplay abounds.

Each villain has unique objectives and abilities, providing a fresh and distinct strategic challenge with every game session! Experience the thrill of mastering different play styles and navigate the diverse powers of your favorite Disney villains.

Family-friendly Disney Entertainment: 2 to 4 players: Includes 4 Realm Boards, 4 Villain tokens, Villain & Fate Cards, and more. Great choice for family game nights, children's birthday or holiday parties, sleepovers & couples game nights.

title: Monopoly Flip Edition: Marvel Board Game | Ages 8 and Up | 2 to 4 Players | Family Board Games for Kids, Teens, and Adults
description: End the chaos of Kang in the Monopoly Flip Edition: Marvel board game! Time-traveling menace Kang is on the brink of conquering the Marvel Universe, and other Super Villains are capitalizing on the chaos. Playing as Captain America, Ms. Marvel, Spider-Man (Miles Morales), or Wanda Maximoff, players must team up with other Super Heroes to battle the villains, then flip gameboard tiles and race to secure the locations under attack. In this fun kids game, instead of earning money, players can earn cardboard Battle Point chips by collecting protection fees for their secured locations, teaming up with other heroes, and more. The player with the most Battle Points when all the locations have been secured wins! This strategy board game amps up the fun on Family Game Night, and it's a great gift for kids, teens, and fans of Marvel and the Monopoly board games. For 2-4 players, ages 8 and up. © 2023 Marvel. The Hasbro and Monopoly names and logos, the distinctive design of the gameboard, the four corner squares, the Mr. Monopoly name and character, as well as each of the distinctive elements of the board and playing pieces are trademarks of Hasbro for its property trading game and game equipment.
features: MARVEL-THEMED MONOPOLY GAME: Step into the Marvel Universe with the Monopoly Flip Edition: Marvel board game! It features favorite Marvel heroes and villains, familiar locations, and exciting themes

END THE CHAOS OF KANG: Time-traveling menace Kang is on the brink of conquering the Marvel Universe, and other Super Villains are capitalizing on the chaos! Stop their attacks on key locations to save the day

CHOOSE A FAVORITE SUPER HERO: Includes 4 molded plastic character tokens. Play as Captain America, Ms. Marvel, Spider-Man (Miles Morales), or Wanda Maximoff. Each has a unique power to lend players an edge

BATTLE AND FLIP TILES TO CHANGE BOARD: On Battle Space tiles, roll the dice to take on Super Villains, such as Venom, Red Hulk, and Hela! Players who win flip over the tile to change the dynamic gameboard

TEAM UP TO SAVE THE MARVEL UNIVERSE: Draw Team-Up cards to join forces with other Super Heroes, such as Black Panther and Wolverine. Each hero has its own power to help players beat Super Villains in battles
FAMILY GAME NIGHT: Power up game nights with this fun family game! It's a crowd-pleasing family board game for teens, adults, and kids ages 8+

title: Ravensburger That's Not A Hat - Fun Bluffing & Memory Party Game for All Ages Components | Ideal for Family Gatherings | Great Replay Value | FSC-Certified Materials
description: Enter the world of Ravensburger's 'That's Not A Hat', a brilliantly fun party game that tests your memory and bluffing skills. Each player must remember the object on each card or convincingly bluff their way through as they pass the card around. But beware, if you're caught declaring the wrong object, you'll earn penalty points. The player with the least points at the end is the winner! This game is crafted from the highest quality components, including 110 beautifully illustrated cards and a user-friendly rulebook. It's easy to learn, making it perfect for players of all ages. Whether you're at home or traveling, 'That's Not A Hat' is incredibly portable and ideal for any occasion. Plus, with each round lasting just 15 minutes, you'll find yourself wanting to play again and again. More than just a game, Ravensburger's 'That's Not A Hat' is also a sustainable choice. Made from materials sourced from well-managed forests and other controlled sources, it's FSC-certified, making it a responsible choice for the planet. Experience the fun, laughter, and a slight dash of mayhem that 'That's Not A Hat' brings to your game nights.

description: There's never been a board game like this before! Your goal is to make it to the end of the board without landing on the Exploding Kitten. To do that you'll play cards and plot strategies to sabotage your opponents. But don't get too cocky because one wrong move can cause the board to flip. This completely transforms the board to reveal a new path where every move could be your last. You have to think fast, form alliances, play smart, and avoid the Exploding Kittens at all costs.
features: The Toy Foundation 2026 Toy of the Year. The stakes are high but the rules are simple: Designed for 2-6 players ages 7+, this party game is easy to learn and quick to play. Just beware, danger, and betrayal, and pee your pants laughing moments lurk around every corner.

The board completely transforms: In this family game, your goal is to make it to the end of the board without exploding. But one wrong move can cause the board to flip, revealing a whole new path where every move could be your last.
Perfect for parties, family game nights, gifting to a die-hard Exploding Kittens fan, or anyone who loves a good strategy game. It’s an adult board game that also brings plenty of family fun!

description: Step into the Renaissance era with the Ravensburger Castles of Burgundy Board Game. As the hundred years' War has ended, conditions are ripe for the princes of the Loire Valley to bring their estates to prosperity. This top-selling game, designed by Stefan Feld, offers an engaging and strategic experience. Players add settlements and castles, trade along the river, operate silver mines, farm livestock, and more. Each decision you make can either propel your realm to glory or lead to your downfall. The game includes numerous components, from six-sided tiles to worker tiles, bonus tiles, victory tiles, and more, all designed to enrich the gameplay. Suitable for 2-4 players and recommended for ages 12 years and up, this game is a perfect choice for a family game night or a gathering with friends. Expect 30-90 minutes of immersive gameplay that encourages strategic thinking and planning. Embrace the opportunity to rule your realm with the Ravensburger Castles of Burgundy Board Game.

title: Renegade Game Studios G.I. Joe Deck-Building Game, 1-4 Players, Cooperative Strategy, Ages 14+
description: Yo Joe Fall In The evil organization Cobra threatens the world with their schemes, and it's up to you and your fellow soldiers to stop them. In this strategic deck-building game, you lead teams of G.I. Joe heroes on cooperative missions to save the world. Each player begins with a modest deck that grows stronger as you recruit legendary G.I. Joe veterans, requisition specialized gear, and deploy powerful vehicles. Every card you add makes your team more formidable, creating a satisfying progression that rewards smart strategic choices. Flexible Gameplay for Every Situation: Play solo for tactical challenges and personal mastery Team up with friends in fully cooperative play where everyone wins or loses together Unlock Expert Mode cards for experienced players seeking greater difficulty Enjoy engaging gameplay in approximately 45-60 minutes per session This fully cooperative game pits your entire team against increasingly dangerous Cobra missions and threats. Designed for one to four players ages 14 and up, the game supports both competitive solo play and collaborative team experiences. The Core Set includes everything needed to begin your journey, with expansions available as you build your collection. Experience the perfect blend of nostalgic G.I. Joe action and modern strategic deck-building mechanics. Command iconic heroes, overcome escalating challenges, and prove that teamwork defeats tyranny.
features: Cooperative Deck-Building: Lead teams of G.I. Joe heroes through escalating missions as you recruit veterans, requisition gear, and field powerful vehicles to defeat Cobra's threats

title: Gutenberg
description: Gutenberg is a mid-weight strategy game taking place in Europe in the 15th century. Each player takes the role of the printing pioneer trying to build their wealth and fame by developing their production capacity and gaining the support of patrons. Through bidding for specific actions the players develop their printing workshops, acquire new fonts, inks and decorations. The unique system of rotating gears allows players to combine bonuses and earn large amounts of points. The game lasts six rounds and the player with the most points at the end wins.

description: Nobody said being a hero would be easy! New York city is being overrun with criminals. The police department either can't handle This new wave of crime, or has been corrupted from the inside and refuses to help. In these troubled times, certain individuals have stepped up to keep the streets safe... While making sure they aren't late to work, or they don't miss another dinner date. Saving the day isn't easy when you've got an active social life to maintain. In Kick-Ass: the board game, players take on the role of one of the masked vigilantes trying to keep new York city safe. Working together, they must keep the evil boss’ plan From coming to fruition. Each round they will travel to the Various districts on the game board, beating up minions, doing good deeds for the citizens, and trying to keep their personal life From falling apart. It's a difficult task, but luckily, they've got their friends to help them out.
features: Highly-detailed miniatures- heroes, bosses, mini-bosses, and minions are all represented by highly-detailed miniature figures.
Thwart different plots- five different bosses are looking to take over new York. Players pick one to face off against at the start of each game.
Different heroes to choose- players pick one of the seven available heroes to play during the game. Each one has unique gear and activation cards They can use.

But watch out. There are 6 unique dangers that are waiting to attack you. Good luck, brave adventurers. Build the sprawling 3D interactive board, then take on challenges, dangers, and objectives from the cards together to collect the crystals. title: Ravensburger Horrified Games - World of Monsters - Strategy Board Game - Boost Critical Thinking & Teamwork - Cooperative Gameplay - Unique Monster Challenges - 1 to 5 Players - Adults & Kids 10+
description:
Dare to enter the Cthulhu world of Ravensburger Horrified - American Monsters, a cooperative strategy board game for kids and adults, where you and your friends must protect this realm from 4 of the most terrifying creatures ever imagined! Face the unique challenges of Sphinx, Yeti, Jiangshi, and Cthulhu - all who have escaped the underworld. Work together to save our realm before it's too late. Perfect for birthday and holiday gifts, parties, family game nights or gatherings with friends, Horrified - World of Monsters offers thrilling gameplay for 1-5 players and lasts approximately 60 minutes. The game is easy to learn with clear and concise instructions, allowing both seasoned strategists and newcomers to jump right into the action.

Inside the box you'll find everything you need for an immersive gaming experience: a sinister and boldly illustrated game board, 4 intricately sculpted miniatures representing the iconic, mythical monsters, game cards, dice, a handy fabric bag, paper movers, and more. Each monster requires a different strategy, making every game a fresh and exciting experience.

A must-have for boys and girls ages 10-12, 11-13, 14-15 and older who cherish challenging board games. Gather your friends, embrace your inner hero, and prepare for a mythically fun adventure that promises hours of entertainment! Gather your team, develop your strategies, and prepare for an unforgettable battle against the legendary World of Monsters in Ravensburger Horrified! Can you save our world before it's too late.
features: Embrace Your Inner Hero: Defend this world against 4 epic underworld monsters you love to fear - Sphinx, Yeti, Jiangshi and Cthulhu. Hours of exciting horrors for boys, girls, family and friends. Test your courage and tactical thinking to survive.

Engaging Strategic Family Gameplay: Defend Earth and connect with your inner monster expert as you navigate the doorway between worlds with cunning tactics to outsmart your opponents utilizing critical thinking, problem solving & teamwork skills.

Visually Stunning: Immerse yourself in the terrifying realms of Horrified - World of Monsters. Exquisite and stunning artwork and thematic components. Add more thrills with Horrified - Greek Monsters. Instructions included to mix and match monsters.

Easy to Learn: Each monster offers a unique challenge, providing a fresh & distinct catastrophe with every game! Experience the thrill of mastering different play styles as you adapt your survival strategies with every 60-minute game session.

Welcome to the Monopoly Boise Edition, a custom version celebrating the unique culture and landmarks of Boise. This board game brings local flavor to a classic, allowing you to acquire properties that showcase the city's heritage.
Whether a resident or a visitor, this Monopoly edition offers a fun and interactive way to experience the distinct aspects of Boise, from historical sites to modern attractions. Dive into the competitive spirit of Monopoly tailored just for Boise!
This Monopoly Edition is engineered to captivate and engage. With gameplay that's suitable for a wide audience, it's particularly perfect for young minds, aged 8 to 12, stimulating their strategic thinking with elements of brain games and educational games. The excitement isn't limited to the young ones—this board game includes layers of complexity that make it a fitting choice for adult game nights, offering to make up your own strategy.
Presenting the Monopoly Regional City Edition as a gift becomes a statement of thoughtfulness and creativity. It's a versatile present that aligns perfectly for gifts for 8 year old girls, teen boy gifts, and family gifts that can be enjoyed by everyone. Whether it's for a birthday or simply to add to a friend's game collection, this game stands out as an ideal gift that promises to deliver fun, learning, and entertainment.

The set includes 1 Instruction Sheet, 1 Deck of 60 Cards, 1 Money Pack, 8 Tokens, 2 Dice, 32 Houses, and 12 Hotels. Monopoly stands making it a perfect addition to any game night. With a nod to classic retro games, it also offers a fresh twist, integrating contemporary gameplay that keeps everyone engaged. From party games for kids aged 8-12 to fun games for adults, this Monopoly Edition transcends generational boundaries and promises an inclusive, enjoyable experience for all players.

title: Rio Grande Games: Beyond The Sun, Strategy Board Game, Base Game, 2 to 4 Players, 90 to 120 Minute Play Time, for Ages 14 and up
description: As Earth begins to die, it is time for humanity to look Beyond the Sun. The faction leaders that once ruled the planet separately, now work together to develop cutting-edge technology and explore the depths of space. However, only one leader will truly reign supreme in these new worlds. Will it be you? Players take turns to take an action available on the technology board, then produce resources. As more technologies are researched, more actions become available to the players. Actions allow players to improve their economy, move spaceships, colonize systems, and research new technologies. Those actions belong exclusively to the player who discovers them until the other players catch up! The game ends when a number of achievements are fulfilled, and the faction with the most points claims victory!
features: As Earth begins to die, it is time for humanity to look Beyond the Sun.

Actions allow players to improve their economy, move spaceships, colonize systems, and research new technologies
For 2-4 Players. 90-120 minute playing time. Ages 14+

Whether you're trawling the jundland wastes for Salvage or headed elsewhere in the galaxy, a few Jawa Scavengers would rarely go amiss.

title: Games Workshop Warhammer 40k - Codex V.9 Genestealer Cult (En)
description: The Tyranids are rapacious alien swarms that emerge from the cold darkness of the intergalactic void. Guided by the unknowable intellect of the Hive Mind, these nightmarish super-predators hunt, kill, and feed without end, stripping world after world of biomass and leaving nothing but airless rocks in their wake. When the Tyranids make planetfall, a seemingly endless tide of Termagants spit vile living ammunition at hapless defenders, while writhing Ripper Swarms surge over the wounded and dead alike. These creatures are guided by intelligent Tyranid Warriors – vicious bioforms bristling with organic weapons – and a monstrous Hive Tyrant, the towering psychic lynchpin of the swarm's advance. Command a teeming horde of bio-engineered monsters to devour the galaxy with Combat Patrol: Tyranids! This boxed set provides you with all the units you need to get started or reinforce an existing army. The contents of this set have been specifically chosen to provide you with a Tyranids force ideal for Combat Patrol-sized games – approximately 25 Power Level's worth of models, which can be built in a variety of ways – and you will also save you money compared to buying the contents individually. This set includes the following multipart plastic models: – 1x Hive Tyrant, which can also be built as a Winged Hive Tyrant or a Swarmlord – 3x Tyranid Warriors, which can also be built as a Tyranid Prime and 2x Tyranid Warriors – 36x Termagants – 3x Ripper Swarms All models are supplied with their appropriate bases. These miniatures are supplied unpainted and require assembly – we recommend using Citadel Plastic Glue and Citadel paints.
features: 112-pages containing tabletop game rules, background lore, and beautiful art
Includes Warlord Traits, Relics, in-depth crusade rules, 22 datasheets, plus a full sheet of ambush tokens
Material: Plastic

description: Marvel X-Men Dice Throne is a fast-playing, dice-rolling combat game that lets players battle as their favorite X-Men heroes in one-on-one duels, team battles, and free-for-alls! Based on the smash success Dice Throne, this Marvel X-Men Dice Throne 4 Hero Box puts players in the roles of Iceman, Psylocke, Storm, and Wolverine, each with their own set of dice, player board, and unique deck of cards. Attack your opponents and activate abilities with dice rolls, accumulate combat points, and spend them on action cards that allow for ability upgrades. All 4 heroes are compatible with the entire Dice Throne ecosystem.

Upgrade abilities and use action cards to outsmart and outmaneuver your opponents.

title: Late for the Sky Horse-Opoly Board Game for Families & Kids, Property Trading Strategy, 2-6 Players, Ages 8+, Educational Horse Breeds, Fast Play Party Fun
description:
Product Description

A Game That Actually Encourages Horseplay! HORSE-OPOLY is a property trading game based on our equine friends. It has all the action of the traditional property trading game...with some galloping good fun! Buy your favorite horses, then collect bales of straw and trade them in for full fledged barns. As you play, turn over the "deeds" for the horses to learn interesting facts about each breed. Sounds like fun, but its a horse of a different color when you get thrown by a bucking bronco, have to pay the farriers fee or GET SENT TO THE TRAILER!! The board features different breeds of horses while each property deed teaches players a little about that breed of horse. Players can choose to be a bail of hay, saddle, horseshoe, horse trailer, bag of oats, or a boot! They buy and sell while trying to become the richest player in the game. So hop in the saddle and take this game for a ride.

From the Manufacturer

Horse-Opoly
features: HORSE-OPOLY is a property trading game based on our equine animal friends. It's a game that actually encourages horseplay!
Includes paper money and a game board
Whatever happens - it's horseplay like you won't soon forget. Standard Play or One Hour Version
Game play is for 2-6 players - 8 years to Adult.

description: Can’t seem to find the time to sit down for a board game? Neither can we. We’re too busy opening the fridge 400 times a day–that’s why we made this magnetic (and advanced) tic-tac-toe game. Now you can simultaneously play nine games of it at once, but passively throughout the day–or week–or month.

We’re too busy opening the fridge 400 times a day–that’s why we made this magnetic (and advanced) tic-tac-toe game. Now you can simultaneously play nine games of it at once, but passively throughout the day–or week–or month.

title: Hunt A Killer: Dead Below Deck, Solve a Murder on a Yacht, Mystery Box Game for True Crime Fans, Murder Mystery Game for Adults, Play True Detective and Crack Unsolved Mysteries, Designed for Ages 14+
description: From the makers of Hunt A Killer, comes another thrilling murder investigation that can be played in just one sitting. This all-in-one board game for adults contains a murder mystery party in a box. The Hunt a Killer team of true-crime masterminds have meticulously created a living, breathing world where players become part of the story. With this authentic investigation kit, you’ll feel like you’re solving a real-life, high-stakes fatal crime. In Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck, one morning in the middle of a luxury Caribbean cruise, the charter, William Bonnys, wakes up hungover and heads to the sauna. There, he finds the body of Rachel Veinson, the yacht's stewardess. Captain Javier Rackhams attends to the scene and initially declares the incident an accident. Nevertheless, he still diverts course to Nassau, where the official authorities look over the scene, coming to the same conclusion. But was it truly an accident or were darker forces at play? Tap into your inner Sherlock Holmes and use forensic evidence to complete a timeline of the crime and eliminate suspects based on means, motive, and opportunity. Each suspect has a backstory, distinct handwriting, and other unique details that will help eliminate them from your list until only one remains. Discover the code to a locked tin, translate Morse code, interpret walkie-talkie messages, decipher a cryptic glyph language, and review maps of the ocean and the yacht itself. Realistic evidence and documents guide players through a challenging and immersive experience filled with unexpected twists and turns. Designed for 1-5 players, you can play it solo, as a couples game, or at your next murder mystery game night. In this unique unsolved case files game anyone can become an ace detective. Perfect as true crime gifts for those who love a good mystery, Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck will have everyone hooked. The mildly challenging yet riveting gameplay will keep your crew on their toes throughout the investigation.
features: Love Murder Mysteries? There's been a death on The Old Thunder yacht. Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck is an immersive murder mystery game that tasks you to find out who killed stewardess Rachel Veinson.

Inspect the Evidence: Work solo or collaboratively to solve this murder mystery game for adults. Pore over forensic files, eliminate suspects, and use your detective skills to piece together a mystery.

Get Inside Criminal Minds: Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck has everything you need to host a killer murder mystery party. This game is rated 2/5 for difficulty, designed for 1 or more players, ages 14+.

Intrigue Ahead: Enjoy 90 minutes of gameplay with this thrilling murder mystery game. Sort though notes, create timelines, pore over evidence, and confirm alibis to crack the case and catch the killer.

Find Your Next Murder Mystery Game Embrace your inner Sherlock Holmes with the complete Hunt A Killer series. Our story-driven card, puzzle, and board games will make any mystery party one to remember.
summary_lines: Best for: general tabletop game fans
detailed_description: A tabletop game with its own rules and pacing -- check the listing for full details.
short_title: Hunt A Killer: Dead Below Deck

title: Hasbro Gaming Battleship Royale Edition Game for 2 to 6 Players, Battleship Party Board Game for Groups, Family Games for Ages 8 and Up, (Amazon Exclusive)
description: Many will sink. One will survive. Face off with up to 6 players and compete to be the last afloat in the Battleship Royale game! In this exciting party game take on the beloved Battleship search-and-find game, all players share one Battle Grid to mark hits and misses. Instead of placing physical ships, they're dealt Ship cards that reveal their fleet and where their ships live on the grid. The cards slip into handheld Command, so players can secretly track hits. Roll the die to fire to fire on opponents. The last one with a ship left on the grid wins! Ready to level up? Play in Advanced Mode and create an elite fleet with the addition of submarines, which can share coordinates with ships and have ship-detecting Sonar capabilities! The Battleship Royale gameboard stores easily and has built-in trays for pegs. It's a thrilling game for Family Game Night and makes a fun gift for kids ages 8 and up! Battleship and Hasbro Gaming and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.
features: BATTLESHIP ROYAL EDITION GAME FOR GROUPS: The Battleship Royale game is the first-ever Battleship game that lets players face off with up to 6 opponents! Who will be the last afloat to win?

SHARE THE BATTLE GRID: Inspired by classic Battleship search and find gameplay, this fun family game features 1 shared Battle Grid: players track ship locations by marking hits and misses on it together
SECRETLY TRACK HITS: Each player is dealt Ship cards revealing their ships' locations on the grid using coordinates. The cards slide into handheld Command Centers that let players secretly track hits
MANY WILL SINK, ONE WILL SURVIVE: Roll the die for the number and location of shots on the grid, and fire! Mark a hit or miss with a peg (or two). The last player with a ship left standing wins
LEVEL UP WITH AN ELITE FLEET: Amp up the strategy in Advanced Mode with the addition of submarines, which can share coordinates with ships and have ship-detecting Sonar capabilities
FUN FOR GAME NIGHTS: This Battleship Royale strategy game for 2 to 6 players is an exciting game for Family Game Night, and it makes a great gift for families and kids ages 8 and up

SPOOKY SERIES: Scary movie lovers and fans of fantasy books will love playing through five scenarios, like The Haunted Mask, in this board game based on classic delightfully creepy Goosebumps books
SPIN MASTER GAMES: We have coffee table ready board games for adults, board games for kids 8-12, 1000 piece puzzle for adults, family games, yard games, game room decor, & your fave brands

BOARD GAMES FOR FAMILY NIGHT: For your next games for family game night, bring one of our adult games, couples games, party games, 500 piece puzzles for adults, games for kids ages 4-8, or card games for adults

Includes 4 Kid Movers, 4 Monster Movers, 12 Worm Movers, 4 Player Reference Cards, 1 Monster Die, 16 Help Guide Cards, 4 L Clips, 4 Corner Stands, 1 Neighborhood Game Board, 5 Monster Boards, 94 Monster Cards, 48 Tokens

title: Pathfinder Player Core - Second Edition Remaster Hardcover Rulebook for Tabletop RPG, Complete Character Creation Guide with 8 Classes & Ancestries
description:
Your Story Starts Here! Pathfinder Player Core presents a new entry point to Pathfinder Second Edition, with everything a player needs to learn how to play the game! Choose from eight ancestries, eight complete character classes, and hundreds of feats and spells to make unique characters ready for deadly adventures in a world beset by magic and evil! This 464-page hardcover tome is the definitive rules resource for all Pathfinder Second Edition players!
Pathfinder Player Core is the first core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! These rules are compatible with previous Pathfinder Second Edition rulebooks, incorporating comprehensive errata and rules updates and some of the best additions from later books into new, easier-to-access volumes with new presentations inspired by years of player feedback. Along with the GM Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2, these books provide a new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming!
Pathfinder Player Core includes: Easier to Learn!We've taken feedback from the Beginner Box and the Core Rulebook and made this new entry into the Pathfinder Roleplaying Game easier to navigate and get right into the fun. Complete character creation rules, walking you through building a character by selecting your Ancestry, Background, and Class, with a focus on the bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, and wizard! Core ancestry options include human, dwarf, elf, gnome, goblin, halfling, leshy, and orc! A mountain of options allowing you to customize your character including versatile heritages, like the changeling and nephilim, skills and feats, and hundreds of spells (including dozens of new ones), ensuring that the character you build represents your hero not just in story, but in rules as well! Everything you need to know to start playing, from advice on how to explore the world to tips on surviving deadly combats with terrifying foes. A primer on the world of Lost Omens so that your character can be a part of an exciting and diverse world! Rules and tools to advance your character through play, taking them from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take on the world to a veteran hero, wielding powerful magic that can reshape reality! Fully integrated errata from the first 4 years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including revisions to the witch, expanded options for every character class, streamlined spells, new equipment, and more!

This is the first Pathfinder product published under the new Open RPG Creative (ORC) license, giving players and Game Masters even more freedom for making their own creations based on Pathfinder Second Edition.
features: Complete player rulebook: Everything needed to create and play Pathfinder Second Edition characters including 8 ancestries (human, dwarf, elf, gnome, goblin, halfling, leshy, orc) and 8 classes (bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, wizard)
Easier to learn design: Streamlined rules based on feedback from Beginner Box and Core Rulebook make this the most accessible entry point into Pathfinder roleplaying for new and experienced players

Hundreds of customization options: Extensive selection of feats, spells, versatile heritages like changeling and nephilim, plus fully integrated 4-year errata with expanded class options and new equipment
Complete world primer included: Features Lost Omens setting information, exploration guidance, combat survival tips, and character advancement rules from novice adventurer to legendary hero

Hardcover durability and quality: Premium binding and high-quality paper designed to withstand frequent use during gaming sessions, making it the definitive rules resource for Pathfinder Second Edition players

title: Sequence Premium Edition - Stunning Set with Giant Board (20.25 x 26.25 inches), Exclusive Chips and Deluxe Cards by Goliath, Blue, for Ages 7+
description: The easy-to-learn, fun-to-play classic that's been a best-seller for over 35 years! Play a card from your hand, and place a chip on a corresponding space on the game board. Block your opponents and remove their chips, but watch out for the Jacks - they're wild! Get five-in-a-row for a SEQUENCE! Play the game of SEQUENCE as you never have before with this exceptional set which includes a giant game board (20.25 x 26.25 inches) and exclusive marker chips for your captured SEQUENCES. This stunning set also includes a card storage box detailed in gold foil with a deluxe deck of SEQUENCE playing cards. It's the perfect addition to the SEQUENCE fan's game collection! For 2-12 players, ages 7 and up.
features: Play a card from your hand, and place a chip on a corresponding space on the game board - when you have five in a row, it’s a SEQUENCE!
Each player or team tries to score the required number of five-card SEQUENCES before their opponents
Easy enough for children, challenging for adults!
This stunning set includes a giant game board (20.25 x 26.25 inches) and exclusive chips for your captured SEQUENCES
For 2-12 players, ages 7 and up
